_note: ETF Momentum v3 universe filter for Indian markets. Covers NSE-listed ETFs. No leveraged/inverse products allowed. Minimum AUM in INR.
_min_aum_inr_note: ₹500 crore minimum AUM. Equivalent to ~$60M USD at 83 INR/USD.
_fractionable_note: NSE does not support fractional shares; whole-lot orders only.
_min_universe_size_note: If fewer than 5 ETFs match, halt strategy for this decision (DiscoveryUnavailable).
_starter_allowlist_note: Well-established NSE ETFs used as fallback when live instrument data is unavailable (test/backtest only). Sources: NSE India ETF listings.
